channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: ソニー銀行、数万曲の音楽に間接投資 デジタル証券通じ www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO... …
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
ソニー銀行、数万曲の音楽に間接投資　デジタル証券通じ
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

レディー・ガガやブルーノ・マーズなどの楽曲を含む約4万5千曲の版権に、間接的に投資できる仕組みをつくります。

#ニュース
item.content:encoded:
ソニー銀行、数万曲の音楽に間接投資　デジタル証券通じ
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

レディー・ガガやブルーノ・マーズなどの楽曲を含む約4万5千曲の版権に、間接的に投資できる仕組みをつくります。

#ニュース

item.title: #🔖学び 「はたらく図書館員」想定外の人気 帯広市図書館のユーチューブ動画５万回超え（十勝毎日新聞） 帯広市図書館（…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖学び
「はたらく図書館員」想定外の人気　帯広市図書館のユーチューブ動画５万回超え（十勝毎日新聞）

帯広市図書館（永田拓也館長）が公式ユーチューブチャンネルで公開している動画「はたらく図書館員」の再生回数が５万回を突破した。同館は「ここまで視聴回数が伸びたのは想定外」と多くの関心を集めていることに驚きつつ、「市民に図書館への理解を深めてもらえるよう、今後も取り組みを進めていきたい」としている。 ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖学び
「はたらく図書館員」想定外の人気　帯広市図書館のユーチューブ動画５万回超え（十勝毎日新聞）

帯広市図書館（永田拓也館長）が公式ユーチューブチャンネルで公開している動画「はたらく図書館員」の再生回数が５万回を突破した。同館は「ここまで視聴回数が伸びたのは想定外」と多くの関心を集めていることに驚きつつ、「市民に図書館への理解を深めてもらえるよう、今後も取り組みを進めていきたい」としている。 ...

item.title: A growing rift between the UAE and Saudi Arabia is splitting…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
A growing rift between the UAE and Saudi Arabia is splitting the Middle East's deepest pockets — and Wall Street is terrified of being caught in the crossfire. Read more: bloom.bg/4w3WhV4

📷: UAE Presidential Court/Handout/Anadolu/Getty Images
item.content:encoded:
A growing rift between the UAE and Saudi Arabia is splitting the Middle East's deepest pockets — and Wall Street is terrified of being caught in the crossfire. Read more: bloom.bg/4w3WhV4

📷: UAE Presidential Court/Handout/Anadolu/Getty Images

item.title: DK社編 日暮雅通訳『ここまでわかった！ 最新 宇宙大図鑑』発売。 最新探査機と宇宙望遠鏡でのぞく未知の宇宙！ 大迫力…
item.author: 河出書房新社 (@kawade.co.jp)
item.description:
DK社編　日暮雅通訳『ここまでわかった！　最新　宇宙大図鑑』発売。

最新探査機と宇宙望遠鏡でのぞく未知の宇宙！　大迫力の大きな画像がいっぱい。「アルテミス計画」など、最新ミッションも多数掲載。
www.kawade.co.jp/np/isbn/4309...
item.content:encoded:
DK社編　日暮雅通訳『ここまでわかった！　最新　宇宙大図鑑』発売。

最新探査機と宇宙望遠鏡でのぞく未知の宇宙！　大迫力の大きな画像がいっぱい。「アルテミス計画」など、最新ミッションも多数掲載。
www.kawade.co.jp/np/isbn/4309...

item.title: #🔖おもしろ 爪って、もういらなくね？ 定期的に切らなきゃいけないし、爪の間にはゴミ.. 爪って、もういらなくね？ …
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖おもしろ
爪って、もういらなくね？ 定期的に切らなきゃいけないし、爪の間にはゴミ..

爪って、もういらなくね？ 定期的に切らなきゃいけないし、爪の間にはゴミが溜まるし、足の爪なんて放っておくと垢が溜まって臭くなる。 伸びるメリットより、メンテナンスの手間の方が圧倒的に大きい。 正直、缶を開ける時ぐらいしか「爪あって良かった」って思ったことない。 いっそのこと、永久脱毛みたいに「爪の永...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖おもしろ
爪って、もういらなくね？ 定期的に切らなきゃいけないし、爪の間にはゴミ..

爪って、もういらなくね？ 定期的に切らなきゃいけないし、爪の間にはゴミが溜まるし、足の爪なんて放っておくと垢が溜まって臭くなる。 伸びるメリットより、メンテナンスの手間の方が圧倒的に大きい。 正直、缶を開ける時ぐらいしか「爪あって良かった」って思ったことない。 いっそのこと、永久脱毛みたいに「爪の永...

item.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham, Republican of South Carolina, died of a…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, Republican of South Carolina, died of an aortic dissection — a rip in the aorta, the main artery carrying blood from the heart to the rest of the body. Here's what to know about the condition.
item.content:encoded: Sen. Lindsey Graham, Republican of South Carolina, died of an aortic dissection — a rip in the aorta, the main artery carrying blood from the heart to the rest of the body. Here's what to know about the condition.

item.title: 【書評】7/11朝日新聞に『世界文学重層』評が掲載されました。評者は酒井啓子さんです。「宗主国の言語と母語と、さらには祖…
item.author: みすず書房 (@misuzushobo.bsky.social)
item.description:
【書評】7/11朝日新聞に『世界文学重層』評が掲載されました。評者は酒井啓子さんです。「宗主国の言語と母語と、さらには祖国の運命に翻弄されて移住した他国の言葉と、複数の言葉のなかでどのように自らを語るのか…」

何語で語るか、ねじれた「語圏」
book.asahi.com/article/1671...
item.content:encoded:
【書評】7/11朝日新聞に『世界文学重層』評が掲載されました。評者は酒井啓子さんです。「宗主国の言語と母語と、さらには祖国の運命に翻弄されて移住した他国の言葉と、複数の言葉のなかでどのように自らを語るのか…」

何語で語るか、ねじれた「語圏」
book.asahi.com/article/1671...

item.title: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emb…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emblem Warriors: Three Hopes! This track goes crazy! The guitar is absolutely shredding, the drums are bumping, and the trumpets add a hopeful sound to the track! My favorite is the organ, it has an incredible sound! It's an awesome track!
item.content:encoded: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emblem Warriors: Three Hopes! This track goes crazy! The guitar is absolutely shredding, the drums are bumping, and the trumpets add a hopeful sound to the track! My favorite is the organ, it has an incredible sound! It's an awesome track!

item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)

item.title: I let my daughter, 9, stay up a little late to finish readin…
item.author: Joseph Rezek (@rezekjoe.bsky.social)
item.description: I let my daughter, 9, stay up a little late to finish reading her third Nancy Drew mystery, by the lamp at her bed. Is it 1955? 1985? What is happening? Not a phone in sight, literacy thriving; don’t let the world fall apart.
item.content:encoded: I let my daughter, 9, stay up a little late to finish reading her third Nancy Drew mystery, by the lamp at her bed. Is it 1955? 1985? What is happening? Not a phone in sight, literacy thriving; don’t let the world fall apart.

.

item.title: Texas AG Ken Paxton vowed to “stop at nothing to uncover and…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Texas AG Ken Paxton vowed to “stop at nothing to uncover and stop any illegal voting activity.”

But experts say he may have violated state law by using an address where he no longer appears to live to vote in six elections in two years.

w/ @texastribune.org
item.content:encoded:
Texas AG Ken Paxton vowed to “stop at nothing to uncover and stop any illegal voting activity.”

But experts say he may have violated state law by using an address where he no longer appears to live to vote in six elections in two years.

w/ @texastribune.org

item.title: @hcrichardson.bsky.social turned decades of studying democra…
item.author: 💙🏳️‍🌈 Goldie (aka Kh’ymm) 🏳️‍🌈💙 (@thegoldfishmind.bsky.social)
item.description:
@hcrichardson.bsky.social turned decades of studying democracy into a nightly act of devotion, writing alone past midnight, no sponsors, no noise, just truth and care.

She’s given millions a place to breathe, to understand, to feel less alone. Grateful for her light in the dark.

TYSM HCR!

#Pinks
item.content:encoded:
@hcrichardson.bsky.social turned decades of studying democracy into a nightly act of devotion, writing alone past midnight, no sponsors, no noise, just truth and care.

She’s given millions a place to breathe, to understand, to feel less alone. Grateful for her light in the dark.

TYSM HCR!

#Pinks

item.title: Painting of the Day. Family IV > > www.artcameroon.com/fami…
item.author: Angu Walters 🖌 African Paintings (@artcameroon.bsky.social)
item.description:
Painting of the Day. Family IV
> > www.artcameroon.com/family-4-afr...
In this vibrant 4-foot acrylic piece, Angu Walters has woven geometric shapes and figurative forms to celebrate the essence of togetherness. The interlocking patterns symbolize life's complex tapestry.
$2200
item.content:encoded:
Painting of the Day. Family IV
> > www.artcameroon.com/family-4-afr...
In this vibrant 4-foot acrylic piece, Angu Walters has woven geometric shapes and figurative forms to celebrate the essence of togetherness. The interlocking patterns symbolize life's complex tapestry.
$2200

item.title: It's a big day for me. I am very excited to have been promot…
item.author: Sarah Wieten (@sarahwieten.bsky.social)
item.description:
It's a big day for me.
I am very excited to have been promoted to Associate Professor in the Durham University Philosophy department.
Thank you very much to my many mentors, co-authors, colleagues, friends and family for the support in getting here.
item.content:encoded:
It's a big day for me.
I am very excited to have been promoted to Associate Professor in the Durham University Philosophy department.
Thank you very much to my many mentors, co-authors, colleagues, friends and family for the support in getting here.

item.title: Paul Gauguin - Rue du Nord in Rouen, 1884
item.author: fravery.bsky.social (@fravery.bsky.social)
item.description: Paul Gauguin - Rue du Nord in Rouen, 1884
item.content:encoded: Paul Gauguin - Rue du Nord in Rouen, 1884

item.title: My dog just sat bolt upright in the middle of the night at f…
item.author: SeaTea (@tierno158.bsky.social)
item.description: My dog just sat bolt upright in the middle of the night at full attention. Someone in Kuala Lumpur must have unwrapped a slice of cheese.
item.content:encoded: My dog just sat bolt upright in the middle of the night at full attention. Someone in Kuala Lumpur must have unwrapped a slice of cheese.

item.title: Ha! Von der Ausstellungsreise zurück wartet kistenweise im H…
item.author: Guido Kühn (@guido-kuehn.bsky.social)
item.description: Ha! Von der Ausstellungsreise zurück wartet kistenweise im Hausflur der Sonderband "Physik verhandelt nicht" mit ausgesuchten Illustrationen zum politisch-gesellschaftlichen Zeitgeschehen der letzten Jahre darauf von mir signiert, verpackt und versendet zu werden. Bin dann mal Bücher eintüten :)
item.content:encoded: Ha! Von der Ausstellungsreise zurück wartet kistenweise im Hausflur der Sonderband "Physik verhandelt nicht" mit ausgesuchten Illustrationen zum politisch-gesellschaftlichen Zeitgeschehen der letzten Jahre darauf von mir signiert, verpackt und versendet zu werden. Bin dann mal Bücher eintüten :)

item.title: I've always been a fan of this book series. I must admit, th…
item.author: Svetovid (@svetovid.bsky.social)
item.description: I've always been a fan of this book series. I must admit, though, the sequel departs quite a bit thematically from the first book, almost as if the author had chosen to take a whole different tack.
item.content:encoded: I've always been a fan of this book series. I must admit, though, the sequel departs quite a bit thematically from the first book, almost as if the author had chosen to take a whole different tack.
